title: Native Config Overlay: Runtime Secret Evidence

blocks.text: The executable public contract for this boundary is generated from [`runtime-secret-private-evidence.riido.json`](../../../30-architecture/runtime-secret-private-evidence.riido.json) and rendered at [`runtime-secret-private-evidence.md`](../../../30-architecture/runtime-secret-private-evidence.md).

rows: references and payload shape for server bearer/authZ/review-token readiness metadata
`rotatable=true`, rotation timestamps, and max-age metadata are valid and not due
raw secret values, token values, payload bodies

blocks.text: Public CI validates that only metadata fields and `ssm:DescribeParameters` are allowed. Private infra owns live packets, but those packets must satisfy the public generated contract and must not contain raw values.
